# KSA Silmakeskus (KSA Eye Centre)
> Estonia's leading laser eye surgery clinic since 2005

## Key Facts
- 55,000+ laser procedures performed
- 0 ectasia cases in 20+ years (zero complications)
- Up to 7-year guarantee — longest in the Baltics
- Locations: Tallinn (J. Vilmsi 5) and Tartu (Riia 2)
- Phone: +372 644 5060
- Website: https://ksa.ee

## Core Procedure: Flow3 SmartSurface
- Energy-optimized touch-free laser vision correction
- Uses 25-50% less energy than competitors (LASIK, SMILE)
- No incision, no flap — pure laser surface ablation
- SCHWIND AMARIS technology
- Procedure takes under 1 minute per eye
- Clear vision next day, back to sports in 7 days
- Flow3 Standard: €2,990 (both eyes)
- Flow3 Signature: €3,990 (both eyes)
- Instalment available from €63/month via Inbank or LHV

## Flow3 Eye Examination
- 60-minute comprehensive eye exam + consultation
- Price: €69
- 100% deducted from procedure price if patient proceeds within 60 days

## Medical Team
- Dr. Ants Haavel — CEO and Ophthalmic Surgeon, 20+ years experience
- Dr. Karl-Erik Tillmann — Ophthalmic Surgeon
- Op. nurse Ave Treier — Theatre nurse and patient journey lead

## Safety Record
- Zero ectasia cases in entire history (unique in the Baltics)
- 26 out of 27 KSA staff members chose Flow3 for their own eyes
- 93% of patients say Flow3 was their best life decision
- 99% would recommend to a friend
- FDA PROWL study: over 95% satisfaction rate for laser vision correction

## Why Flow3 vs LASIK/SMILE
- No corneal flap creation (eliminates flap-related complications)
- Touch-free (no instrument contacts the eye)
- 25-50% less energy than LASIK or SMILE
- Suitable for thin corneas (where LASIK is contraindicated)
- Preserves more corneal tissue

## Languages
- Estonian (primary)
- Russian
- English

- Best time to invest in yourself: https://ksa-besttime.vercel.app
- Financing options: https://ksa-finance.vercel.app
- Time tax of glasses: https://ksa-timetax.vercel.app
- Why give up glasses: https://ksa-glasses.vercel.app
- Sports and active life: https://ksa-sports.vercel.app
